name: trustcheck-gate
description: Read-only agent skill that gates AI-selected Python dependencies through Trustcheck before installation or remediation.

interface.shortDescription: Gate AI dependency changes with Trustcheck.
interface.longDescription: Adds a read-only agent skill and strict adapter for checking AI-selected Python packages, dependency files, release provenance, and remediation plans with Trustcheck.
defaultPrompt: Check a package with Trustcheck before adding it.
Scan this project's dependency files with Trustcheck.
Compare two package versions for supply-chain risk.
